callGraph.callee:
[
        configData.app_name,
        configData.module_pack,
        configData.module_catalog.map((item) => `${item.key}:${item.enabled}`).join("|"),
        plans.map((plan) => `${plan.id}:${plan.updated_at}`).join("|"),
        flags.map((flag) => `${flag.id}:${flag.updated_at}`).join("|"),
        templates.map((template) => `${template.id}:${template.updated_at}`).join("|"),
    ].join

params:

    onSave,

}

functions.name: AdminSettingsContent
params:
{
    configData,
    databaseSettings,

callGraph.callee:
nextTasks
                    .filter((task) => task.status === option.value)
                    .sort((left, right) => left.position - right.position)
                    .map

new Intl.DateTimeFormat(undefined, {
        month: "short",
        day: "numeric",
        year: "numeric",
        hour: "numeric",
        minute: "2-digit",
    }).format
